title: cyperus laetus
intro: Cyperus laetus, also known as the yellow sedge or yellow papyrus, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus laetus include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cyperus laetus can be made by infusing the roots and rhizomes in water or oil to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
